title.zh: 中国化妆品进入英国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國化妝品進入英國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China cosmetic product documentation against UK Cosmetics Regulation requirements: UK Responsible Person, SCPN notification, Cosmetic Product Safety Report, prohibited and restricted substance schedules, GMP (ISO 22716), and labelling (INCI, claims).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国化妆品文件与英国《化妆品条例》要求差距对照，涵盖英国责任人、SCPN通报、化妆品产品安全报告、禁用与限制物质附表、良好生产规范（ISO 22716）及标签（INCI、宣称）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國化妝品文件與英國《化妝品條例》要求差距對照，涵蓋英國責任人、SCPN通報、化妝品產品安全報告、禁用與限制物質附表、良好生產規範（ISO 22716）及標籤（INCI、聲稱）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a legal opinion, regulatory decision, safety assessment, product authorisation, or market-access approval. Cosmetics exporters, importers, UK Responsible Persons, and safety assessors should verify current UK law, OPSS guidance, applicable substance schedules, and labelling requirements with qualified regulatory professionals before placing any product on the UK market. Northern Ireland follows EU rules under the Windsor Framework and is not covered by this comparison.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成法律意见、监管决定、安全评估、产品授权或市场准入批准。化妆品出口商、进口商、英国责任人及安全评估员在将任何产品投放英国市场前，应与具备资质的监管专业人士核验现行英国法律、OPSS指引、适用物质附表及标签要求。北爱尔兰依据《温莎框架》沿用欧盟规则，不在本对照表覆盖范围内。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成法律意見、監管決定、安全評估、產品授權或市場准入批准。化妝品出口商、進口商、英國責任人及安全評估員在將任何產品投放英國市場前，應與具備資質的監管專業人士核驗現行英國法律、OPSS指引、適用物質附表及標籤要求。北愛爾蘭依據《溫莎框架》沿用歐盟規則，不在本對照表覆蓋範圍內。

answer_first.en: Appointing a UK Responsible Person and completing SCPN notification, obtaining a CPSR from a qualified assessor, screening formulations against current UK substance schedules (which are diverging from EU post-Brexit), ensuring GMP per ISO 22716, and creating new English-language labels with INCI ingredients and UK RP details are the five mandatory compliance steps for China-to-UK cosmetics export.
answer_first.zh: 委任英国责任人并完成SCPN通报、由合格评估员出具CPSR、对照当前英国物质附表筛查配方（脱欧后已与欧盟出现差异）、确保符合ISO 22716良好生产规范，以及制作含有INCI成分表和英国责任人信息的全新英文标签——这是化妆品从中国出口英国的五项强制合规步骤。
answer_first.zht: 委任英國責任人並完成SCPN通報、由合格評估員出具CPSR、對照當前英國物質附表篩查配方（脫歐後已與歐盟出現差異）、確保符合ISO 22716良好生產規範，以及製作含有INCI成分表和英國責任人資訊的全新英文標籤——這是化妝品從中國出口英國的五項強制合規步驟。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official UK government sources (GOV.UK, legislation.gov.uk, OPSS), international standards bodies (ISO), and primary legal instruments preferred. Local PDFs and commercial regulatory databases are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. UK-EU post-Brexit divergences must be flagged and dated.
